subject: Add rancher_kubernetes playbook test
commit_message:
Add rancher_kubernetes playbook test

Added tests for rancher_kubernetes playbook.
Note that they install docker-ce 17.06 instead of 18.09, overriding
prepare-docker-dind defaults.

Change-Id: If4b508e874e37b409c71c9876c86351d5f520599
Issue-ID: OOM-1906
Signed-off-by: Michal Zegan <m.zegan@samsung.com>
